parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token retained for 24 hours to make the order idempotent

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability zone name; required for 4.0 regions; use the actual zone name for multi-zone regions and default for single-zone regions

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: Host display name, 2 to 15 characters

parameters.name: flavor_set_type
parameters.description: Package type: fix for a fixed package or band for a bandwidth package

parameters.name: flavor_name
parameters.description: Package name

parameters.name: image_id
parameters.description: Image ID in the selected region

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Subscription duration used with cycle type, up to 60 months

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Subscription cycle type

parameters.name: ip_version
parameters.description: Elastic IP version; defaults to ipv4

parameters.name: boot_disk_size
parameters.description: System disk size in GiB for a bandwidth package; ignored for a fixed package

parameters.name: bandwidth
parameters.description: Bandwidth in Mbit/s for a bandwidth package; ignored for a fixed package

parameters.name: data_disk_list
parameters.description: Data disk objects, with at most five disks per host

parameters.name: user_password
parameters.description: Host user password, 8 to 30 characters and subject to the documented complexity rules

parameters.name: auto_renew_status
parameters.description: Automatic renewal status: 0 disables renewal and 1 enables it

examples: ctyun acs lite-instance create --client-token create-fix-lite-vm-0711-01 --display-name openapi-fix-01 --flavor-set-type fix --flavor-name lite1.fix.medium.2 --image-id dca942b0-e934-4bd5-b5c1-4f5e1aad56a6 --cycle-count 2 --cycle-type MONTH

parameters.description: Package type: fix for a fixed package or band for a bandwidth package

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability zone name; omit to return packages from every zone

parameters.name: flavor_set_type
parameters.description: Package type: fix for a fixed package or band for a bandwidth package

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: User password after rebuild, 8 to 30 characters and subject to the documented complexity rules

parameters.description: New image ID; omit to reuse the original image

examples: ctyun acs lite-instance rebuild adc614e0-e838-d73f-0618-a6d51d09070a --password rebuildTest01

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: Host display name, 2 to 63 characters

parameters.name: flavor_name
parameters.description: Package name

parameters.name: bandwidth
parameters.description: Bandwidth in Mbit/s for the selected package

parameters.name: boot_disk_size
parameters.description: System disk size in GB for the selected package

parameters.name: image_id
parameters.description: Image ID in the selected region

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Subscription duration used with cycle type, up to 60 months

parameters.description: Subscription cycle type

parameters.name: ip_version
parameters.description: Elastic IP version; defaults to ipv4

parameters.name: data_disk_list
parameters.description: Data disk objects, with at most five disks per host

parameters.name: user_password
parameters.description: Host user password, 8 to 30 characters and subject to the documented complexity rules

parameters.name: auto_renew_status
parameters.description: Automatic renewal status: 0 disables renewal and 1 enables it

parameters.name: security_product
parameters.description: Security protection edition; defaults to false

parameters.name: order_count
parameters.description: Number of hosts to purchase, from 1 to 10; defaults to 1

examples: ctyun acs instance create --client-token create-fix-lite-vm-0711-01 --display-name openapi-01 --flavor-name lite1.s.c4m8 --bandwidth 10 --boot-disk-size 120 --image-id dca942b0-e934-4bd5-b5c1-4f5e1aad56a6 --cycle-count 2 --cycle-type MONTH

parameters.description: System disk size in GB for the target package
